title: Graphic Design Intern
description:
Role Description

This is a on-site 4-month paid internship for a Graphic Design Intern based in Pune. You will work closely with our team on real client projects, supporting graphics creation, logo design, and branding tasks. Your day-to-day work will include creating social media creatives, editing images, and assisting in presentations and marketing materials.




You will learn how to understand design briefs, take feedback, and deliver designs that align with business and marketing goals. This role is ideal for someone who wants hands-on experience and is ready to learn in a fast-paced environment.




Qualifications

Basic knowledge of graphic design and design tools
Familiarity with tools like (Adobe Suite) Photoshop, Illustrator, Premier Pro, After Effects
Interest in design, branding, and social media creatives
Creative mindset with attention to detail
Willingness to learn, take initiative, and improve with feedback
Ability to manage simple tasks and meet deadlines
Good communication and teamwork skills
Currently pursuing or recently completed a course in Graphic Design, Visual Arts, or a related field

title: Article Trainee
description:
Company Description

SKPN & Associates LLP is a Chartered Accountancy firm registered with the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI). With significant experience across diverse industries, the firm offers value-added services in audit & assurance, tax, legal, risk management, financial advisory, and consulting. SKPN & Associates emphasizes integrity, ethics, and service excellence in all its operations, underpinned by a robust internal review process and secure systems. Over the years, the firm has steadily grown while maintaining a commitment to helping clients optimize and elevate their financial functions.




Role Description

This is a full-time, on-site role for an Article Trainee based in Pimpri Chinchwad. The Article Trainee will be responsible for assisting in Statutory and Internal audits, Direct & Indirect tax compliance, financial reporting, and consulting projects. Day-to-day tasks include data analysis, documentation, report preparation, and ensuring compliance with relevant laws and regulations. Additionally, the role involves learning and development opportunities to gain expertise in various aspects of chartered accountancy and contribute to client engagements.




Qualifications

CA Intermediate both groups passed out
Strong knowledge in Accounting principles and standards
Understanding of Audit practices and processes
Basic familiarity with Tax compliance and regulations
Proficiency in Financial Reporting and analysis
Ability to effectively manage data analysis and prepare detailed documentation
Good communication skills to interact with clients and team members
A strong commitment to learning and adhering to ethical and professional standards
Proficiency in Microsoft Office and accounting software is a plus
Analytical mindset and problem-solving abilities

title: Sales And Marketing Intern
description:
Company Description

RupeeDot is transforming the lending industry in India with innovative AI-driven fintech solutions. Our platform simplifies access to car and personal loans by utilizing advanced algorithms to match borrowers with the best loan options from leading banks and financial institutions in real time. With a 100% digital and paperless process, we ensure quick approvals, transparent transactions, and flexible repayment options. At RupeeDot, we harness technology to make lending more accessible, efficient, and secure for everyone. Join us at www.rupeedot.com and experience the future of lending.




Role Description

We are seeking a motivated Sales and Marketing Intern to join our team for a full-time, on-site role based in Pune Division. The intern will assist with the implementation of sales strategies, enhance customer engagement through effective communication, and contribute to training efforts for internal and external stakeholders. Responsibilities also include identifying potential clients, managing customer inquiries, and supporting overall marketing initiatives to drive business growth.




Qualifications

Strong skills in Communication and Customer Service to build relationships with clients and address their needs effectively
Lead generation
Knowledge of Sales techniques and a proactive approach to identifying and pursuing new clients
Ability to support Training and Sales Management activities to enhance team and partner performance
Proficiency in problem-solving, time management, and goal-oriented execution
Experience or knowledge in financial services or fintech is a plus
Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in Business, Marketing, or a related field

title: Operations Intern
description:
Role Overview

The Operations Associate supports the smooth execution of internship processes. This role focuses on coordination, data handling, and execution—ensuring students, cross-teams, and internship stakeholders stay aligned and on schedule. The ideal candidate is organized, proactive, and comfortable working with students, data, and multiple teams.




Key Responsibilities

Coordinate with students during internship processes such as resume shortlisting, interviews, training sessions, and assessments.
Plan and schedule training sessions in coordination with faculty and industry experts.
Maintain accurate trackers for student progress, interview status, and internship readiness using Google Sheets / Excel.
Share timely communication with students regarding deadlines, schedules, and next steps.
Work closely with Academics, faculty, and internship teams to ensure smooth execution.
Track student participation and follow up to avoid missed actions or delays.




Skills & Profile

Strong coordination and execution skills with attention to detail.
Proficient in Google Sheets / Excel for tracking and reporting.
Clear and professional communication skills.
Ability to handle multiple tasks and stakeholders efficiently.
Proactive, dependable, and comfortable working in a fast-paced, student-facing role.

About Us

The Manitowoc Company was founded in 1902 and has over a 120-year tradition of providing high-quality, customer-focused products and support services to its markets. Headquartered in Milwaukee, Wisconsin, United States, Manitowoc is one of the world's leading providers of engineered lifting solutions. Manitowoc, through its wholly-owned subsidiaries, designs, manufactures, markets, distributes, and supports comprehensive product lines of mobile hydraulic cranes, lattice-boom crawler cranes, boom trucks, and tower cranes under the Aspen Equipment, Grove, Manitowoc, MGX Equipment Services, National Crane, Potain, Shuttlelift, and Upfits by Aspen Equipment brand names.

title: Product Designer Intern
description:
Product Design Intern – AppsForBharat




Location: HSR Layout, Bengaluru

Role Type: Full-time Internship

Duration: 4 months




About AppsForBharat

AppsForBharat is building beautifully crafted, AI-first consumer experiences that help millions of Indians connect with spirituality and culture. We’re backed by Peak XV Partners, Elevation, Fundamentum, and other top-tier investors, and are one of India’s fastest-growing Series C consumer-tech companies.

Our flagship product, Sri Mandir, is the world’s largest platform for Hindu devotees, powering rituals, teachings, personalized recommendations, and a thriving devotional community.

India’s $44B devotion economy is still largely offline, and we’re bringing structure, accessibility, and meaning to this massive market, where design plays a central role in shaping user behavior at scale.




About the Role

We are looking for a Product Design Intern who will collaborate closely with the Design, Product, Engineering, Business, and Data teams to create intuitive, user-centric digital experiences. This is an opportunity to learn hands-on in a high-growth environment and contribute to products used by millions.




Key Responsibilities

User Experience & Interface Design

Support creation of wireframes, prototypes, and UI screens for upcoming features.
Work with senior designers to translate user insights into engaging UX flows.
Maintain design consistency by following design systems and brand guidelines.

Design Research & Usability

Assist with user interviews, usability tests, and surveys.
Organise and analyse research findings to refine designs.
Coordinate with product & data teams to understand user behaviour and insights.

Visual & Interaction Design

Create pixel-perfect UI elements and interactive components.
Use tools like Figma, Adobe XD, Uizard for building design assets.
Explore motion/interaction design using Principle, ProtoPie, AfterEffects.

Collaboration & Execution

Work with engineers to ensure smooth implementation of designs.
Participate in design reviews, brainstorming sessions, and critiques.
Stay updated on industry trends, tools, and best practices.




What We’re Looking For

Strong interest in UX/UI and digital product design.
Proficiency in Figma / Sketch / Adobe XD.
Experience or interest in using AI design tools (Midjourney, DALL·E, Uizard) is a plus.
Basic understanding of research methodologies (surveys, interviews, usability testing).
Attention to detail and strong aesthetic sense.
Ability to learn quickly and collaborate in a fast-paced environment.
Exposure to motion design tools is an added advantage.
A portfolio showcasing academic, personal, or internship design projects.
Interest in faith-tech and building meaningful user experiences is highly valued.




Why Join Us

Hands-on Learning: Work on end-to-end design problems.
Real Impact: Contribute to products used by millions of devotees globally.
Mentorship: Collaborate with IIT/IIM alumni and industry-leading designers.
Work Environment: Pet-friendly, mindful, and creative workspace in HSR Layout.




Apply Now

Join us to reimagine how Bharat connects with faith, culture, and meaning through the power of design and technology.




Email: saloni@appsforbharat.com

Show more

title: Intern - Marketing & Creative Services
description:
About Us

Seventh Triangle started in 2018 as Direct to Consumer enabler and Digital Transformation Agency. It was founded by a team who have been successful DTC Entrepreneurs themselves. We help Brands achieve Revenue & Profitability growth using Data, Technology and Marketing interventions. Seventh Triangle also happens to be a Shopify Plus Partner in India which allows us to work with enterprise brands Jockey, Titan, Nykaa, V-Guard and many more. With a team size of over 120 across two locations (Noida & Bengaluru), Seventh Triangle is a preferred partner to work with in the Indian D2C and Shopify space.

Responsibilities


Execute off-page SEO end-to-end (backlink building, outreach, submissions)
Identify backlink opportunities and perform competitor link analysis
Assist in keyword research and basic competitor analysis
Support on-page SEO (meta tags, headings, internal linking)
Assist in blog and content optimization
Support basic technical SEO tasks and audits
Track keyword rankings, backlinks, and prepare weekly reports
Monitor performance using Google Analytics & Search Console


Requirements


Basic understanding of SEO fundamentals
Familiarity with SEO tools (GSC, GA4, Ahrefs/SEMrush/Ubersuggest – any one)
Good verbal and written communication skills (for outreach)
Strong attention to detail and willingness to learn
Basic Excel / Google Sheets skills

title: Artificial Intelligence Intern
description:
Artificial Intelligence Intern

Inficore Soft




Location: Remote

Type: Full-Time Internship

Stipend: ₹18,000/month

Duration: 1–3 Months




Inficore Soft is looking for an Artificial Intelligence Intern who is passionate about building intelligent systems and solving real-world problems using AI techniques. This role provides hands-on experience in working with data, developing models, and understanding how AI solutions are applied in practical scenarios.




Key Responsibilities

• Work on AI-driven projects involving data analysis and intelligent systems

• Assist in developing and training machine learning and deep learning models

• Perform data preprocessing, feature engineering, and model evaluation

• Implement algorithms for prediction, classification, and automation tasks

• Collaborate with teams to understand use cases and design AI solutions

• Improve model performance through tuning and experimentation

• Work with Python and relevant AI/ML libraries

• Document workflows, models, and results




Required Skills

• Basic knowledge of Python programming

• Understanding of artificial intelligence and machine learning concepts

• Familiarity with libraries such as Pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn, TensorFlow, or PyTorch

• Basic understanding of statistics and probability

• Knowledge of data preprocessing and model building

• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

• Attention to detail and ability to work with complex data

• Ability to work independently in a remote environment




Eligibility Criteria

• Students or recent graduates from Computer Science, AI, Data Science, or related fields

• Freshers with basic AI/ML knowledge are encouraged to apply

• Candidates with academic or personal AI/ML projects will have an advantage

• Must be available for a full-time remote internship




Perks and Benefits

• Stipend of ₹18,000 per month

• Hands-on experience with real-world AI projects

• Internship completion certificate

• Opportunity to build a strong AI portfolio

• Exposure to modern tools and industry practices

• Learning-focused and growth-oriented environment




This internship is ideal for individuals who want to start their career in artificial intelligence and gain practical experience in building intelligent and scalable solutions.

title: AI - Intern
description:
About Onsurity: www.onsurity.com




Onsurity is a rapidly growing employee healthcare benefits platform that provides flexible and customised healthcare subscriptions for SMEs, start-ups, and enterprises. We believe that access to healthcare benefits shouldn’t be a luxury. It is this philosophy that has strengthened our commitment towards making healthcare affordable and accessible for all.




Our subscriptions include discounts on medicine orders, health checkups, fitness plans, free doctor teleconsultations, and insurance, among other benefits. We believe in inclusivity which means our plans are not limited to full-time employees. We also cover contractual workers, interns, freelancers, and consultants.




We encourage you to read more about us on www.onsurity.com. You can also find us on LinkedIn, Instagram, and YouTube.




Below are stories that define our journey and showcase our commitment to democratizing healthcare across the country.

Onsurity is providing healthcare membership to SMEs with as low as three employees
The Journey Of Startups: Journey Onsurity
Cricketer Anil Kumble backs Onsurity as strategic advisor
Onsurity partners with Gulf Oil to offer healthcare to 10,000 truckers
83% Indian Employees Unaware Of Employer-Provided Healthcare Benefits, Says Study
News: Onsurity secures $45M Series B round led by Creaegis — People Matters

We were also featured in the first season of Disney+ Hotstar's remarkable series, The Great Indian Disruptors.




Our strategic partner and investor, cricketing legend Anil Kumble, is actively involved in our mission to make healthcare more accessible. Anil Kumble recently graced us with his presence at Onsurity’s Bengaluru office and engaged with our employees. He is passionate about our mission and has played an instrumental role in our journey so far.




Recently, Dun & Bradstreet India acknowledged our mission and conferred us with the Dun & Bradstreet Start-up 50 Trailblazer 2023 award.




JOB DESCRIPTION:




Key Responsibilities

Assist in developing and implementing AI/ML models and algorithms
Work on data preprocessing, cleaning, and analysis
Support model training, evaluation, and optimization
Conduct research on the latest AI trends and technologies
Collaborate with engineers and product teams to integrate AI solutions
Document experiments, processes, and results
Participate in brainstorming and problem-solving sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications

Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in Computer Science, AI, Data Science, or related field
Basic understanding of Machine Learning concepts (supervised/unsupervised learning)
Familiarity with Python and libraries like NumPy, Pandas, Scikit-learn
Knowledge of deep learning frameworks (e.g., TensorFlow or PyTorch) is a plus
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Good communication and teamwork abilities

title: Tax Intern, Tax Reporting
description:
Description

Amazon is seeking an enthusiastic Tax Intern to work in its Global Direct Tax Reporting and Compliance Teams based in Hyderabad, Bangalore, Pune.

The Amazon Tax Department is a fast-paced, team-focused, dynamic environment. The mission of Global Tax Reporting and Compliance team is to comply with US Domestic and International/Foreign Tax reporting requirements and manage the worldwide, tax-related filings of Amazon’s legal entities.

This position will be responsible (as part of a larger team) for the preparation of various Tax returns or filings, related calculations and maintaining strong compliance supporting documentation. This position may also assist in the provision of data to tax authorities and other tax compliance actions relating to Amazon’s global operations.

Work may also include supporting internal and external audits, and cross-functional liaising with colleagues from Accounting, Business and other Finance Department.

A successful candidate will have good organizational and communication skills, a strong attention to detail, basic understanding of financial systems, accounting (IFRS/US GAAP) and direct tax concepts.

Key job responsibilities

Working with Global Direct Tax Reporting and Compliance team, Tax Intern will be required to:


Prepare monthly/quarterly tax computation including detailed working papers. to support various tax filings.
Prepare monthly/quarterly tax payment calculations and supporting scheduled to ensure timely tax payments.
Prepare monthly/ quarterly tax provision workings and analysis to support Amazon’s Global Tax provision and reporting requirements.
Able to extract, analyse, and review accounting data and make appropriate recommendations/adjustments in tax calculations.
Coordinate information requests with internal and external service providers to ensure accurate and timely closure of tax reporting deliverables.
Supporting new entity and business launches from a tax standpoint.
Identify process improvements which increase efficiency and scalability of data.


About The Team

The Global Direct Tax Reporting and Compliance team (Direct R&C) is responsible for ensuring Amazon is compliant worldwide for Income tax, Excise tax, withholding tax, Tax provisions and R&D.

Key focus is on Income Tax controllership function and the related operations; this includes, but is not limited to US GAAP/SEC Reporting, Standalone Financial Statement Reporting for Foreign Subsidiaries, Tax Controversy Support

Basic Qualifications


1+ years of finance experience


Preferred Qualifications


IPCC Cleared


Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.


Company - ADCI HYD 13 SEZ - H84

Job ID: A3165346

title: MIS Intern
description:
Brelex Media is looking for a detail-oriented and data-driven MIS Specialist to join our growing team. If you have a passion for data accuracy, reporting, and working with spreadsheets, this role is for you. Freshers with strong Excel or Google Sheets skills are also encouraged to apply.

Key Responsibilities


Manage and maintain MIS reporting systems, ensuring accurate and timely delivery of data.
Collect and compile data from multiple departments in predefined formats within strict timelines.
Validate data for completeness, correctness, and consistency to ensure zero discrepancies in reports.
Prepare and maintain Daily, Weekly, and Monthly MIS reports covering productivity, performance metrics, and task tracking.
Regularly update MIS trackers, maintain historical records, and ensure proper version control.
Implement data backup processes and ensure data security at all times.
Share structured reports with management, highlighting gaps, pending data, and key variations.
Maintain strict confidentiality of internal business data and reports.


Required Skills & Qualifications


Knowledge of MIS reporting, data management, and operations reporting.
Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets.
Hands-on experience with:
Pivot Tables
Filters and Sorting
Conditional Formatting
Data Validation
Strong understanding of advanced formulas such as:
VLOOKUP / XLOOKUP
IF functions
High attention to detail with strong accuracy and analytical skills.
Ability to manage deadlines and handle multiple data sources efficiently.

Who Can Apply


Freshers with strong Excel/Google Sheets skills
Candidates with prior experience in MIS/Data Reporting roles
Individuals who are organized, detail-oriented, and proactive


Skills: google sheets,data,excel,sheets,reporting,advanced

title: Management / ISO Trainee
description:
Job Opening Announcement




Subject: Hiring: Management Trainee (ISO & Systems Consulting) – Vapi

Echelon Consultancy is looking for a dynamic Management Trainee to join our team. If you are passionate about how organizational systems drive business growth, we want to hear from you.




The Role: As a Management Trainee, you will gain hands-on exposure to diverse projects across various industries. This is a full-time on-site role for a Management / ISO Trainee, located in Vapi.
